title: Add the option to mass replace users listed on items and subitems
excerpt:
The function is needed when deactivating a user and transferring his agenda to a new employee. 
It would be convenient to be able to do this in bulk for selected boards or the entire workspace.

posts.author: petr (Petr Svatoš)
posts.cookedHtml:
The function is needed when deactivating a user and transferring his agenda to a new employee.
It would be convenient to be able to do this in bulk for selected boards or the entire workspace.
